<reflection>the word "likás" contains a diacritic mark (an acute accent) over the letter "a". normalizing diacritics means removing the accent marks and replacing them with their base characters. so "á" becomes "a", resulting in "likas".</reflection>
<answer>likas</answer>

question: Normalize the diacritics from the word "bútil".
response:
<reflection>normalizing diacritics means removing accent marks from the characters. the word "bútil" has an acute accent on the letter "ú", which when normalized becomes "u", resulting in "butil".</reflection>
<answer>butil</answer>
